accreditation.name: Middle States Commission on Higher Education
accreditation.notes: AUB states that it is accredited in the US by MSCHE.

faculties_discovered: Maroun Semaan Faculty of Engineering and Architecture
Faculty of Agricultural and Food Sciences
Suliman S. Olayan School of Business

admissions_process.summary: Applicants use the AUB application management portal, review admissions requirements first, and then log in or create an account to start or continue an application.
steps: Review admissions requirements and English language requirements.
Create an account or log in to the application management portal.
Submit the graduate application and supporting materials.
Wait for the admissions decision and complete any required RUSE/English proof.

required_documents: English language proof as required by AUB
Program-specific materials if requested by the school or department

general_admission_requirements.summary: AUB says it seeks applicants with strong academic excellence, intellectual vitality, and civic responsibility.

english_requirement.summary: Graduate applicants must demonstrate RUSE. AUB lists minimums of AUB-EN 40, TOEFL iBT 97, IELTS Academic 7, GRE Verbal 147, GMAT Verbal 25, or DET 120, with validity periods varying by test.

tuition_policy.summary: Tuition is published by the Office of the Comptroller. The student tuition page points to the current academic year's schedule and to payment deadline information maintained by the Registrar.
tuition_policy.source_note: Current fees were not fully extracted here.

fee_structure.summary: AUB publishes a tuition and fees schedule for the current academic year. Specific graduate program fees vary by program and were only captured where explicitly stated on a program page.

graduate_calendar.summary: The Graduate Council publishes orientation, thesis deadline, and event information; the Registrar publishes important dates and deadline pages.
graduate_calendar.notes: A single consolidated graduate calendar was not fully extracted.

scholarships.summary: AUB states that it offers scholarship programs for undergraduate and/or graduate students.
scholarships.notes: Program-specific scholarship eligibility was not fully extracted.

assistantships.summary: The Graduate Council says around 50% of master's students benefit from graduate assistantships and scholarships, and the vast majority of PhD students receive fellowships with full tuition waiver and monthly stipends.

financial_aid.summary: AUB's Office of Financial Aid says the need-based program supports qualified students who could not otherwise meet tuition costs.
financial_aid.notes: The public financial-aid page is written primarily for undergraduate students; graduate-specific aid exists through the Graduate Council and some programs.

payment_plans.summary: The student tuition page references deferred payment requests, but a consolidated graduate payment-plan policy was not extracted.

faq: Graduate admissions and English requirements are published separately by AUB.
Many program pages expose brochure/download links rather than full admissions text.
Some graduate program pages were gated or rendered in a way that hid details from the current browsing session.

sources.page_title: Applications - AUB - Office of Admissions - American University of Beirut - Lebanon

notes: This file captures the university-level graduate policy surface that was publicly visible during discovery.
The full graduate catalog is not fully exposed on some faculty pages in this browsing environment, so this is a verified-but-partial extraction rather than a claim of total completeness.
